title: Backhand Blade
description: Curved blade wielded with a backhand grip. A type of weapon wielded by hornsent for generations. The style of combat associated with this weapon is marked by spinning slashes and gouging thrust attacks.

title: Curseblade's Cirque
description: Weapon of the masked Curseblades. Circular backhand blade with wave-like cutting edges, sharpened into points that incite blood loss. Long ago, this was employed by the ascetics who strove to become tutelary deities as a ritualistic object in their self-flagellating dances.

title: Smithscript Cirque
description: Circular backhand blade engraved with a smithscript. A throwing weapon created through the smithing arts. Execute a strong attack to throw the backhand blade, causing it to fly in a curved trajectory. Incompatible with ashes of war that grant skills with an affinity.

title: Milady
description: A light greatsword; that is, a sword whose blade matches the length of a greatsword, while being constrained to a minimal weight. Nicknamed after ladies of noble status for its refined appearance. With cultivated form, one can wield this weapon as swiftly as one might a straight sword.

title: Leda's Sword
description: Light greatsword with gold inlaid. Weapon of Leda, the Needle Knight. Deals holy damage. Though polished to a mirror sheen, this blade still reeks with the stench of crusted blood that lingers from the cull of her knightly comrades.

title: Rellana's Twin Blades
description: Carian light greatsword embedded with blue glintstone. Weapon of Rellana, the Twin Moon Knight. Two swords as a single armament. When two-handing, a straight sword engraved with golden flame will be carried in the left hand. Here, and here alone, were moon and fire ever together.

title: Great Katana
description: Large katana with a long, heavy blade. A weapon unique to warriors of the Land of Reeds. Designed for aggression, this armament requires the wielder to throw their entire body into swinging it. The slashing attacks of its honed edge incite blood loss.

title: Dragon-Hunter's Great Katana
description: Enormous great katana forged from ancient dragon bone. Weapon of Igon, who survived through sheer force of hatred for dragonkind. The blade's weight demands both hands, but few weapons can match its capacity for dealing devastating blows that incite blood loss.

title: Rakshasa's Great Katana
description: Great katana of the Rakshasa, master of the black arts. A savage slashing weapon whose keen edge is stained with the blood of countless foes. Its slashing attacks incite severe blood loss.

title: Beast Claw
description: Weapon in the form of a beast's claws. Worn over both hands, enabling attacks with both simultaneously. Utilizes the power of bestial incantations and is imbued with the ferocity and wildness of a beast.

title: Red Bear's Claw
description: Weapon in the form of massive claws, fashioned after the red bear. Worn over both hands, enabling attacks with both simultaneously. The claws tear into enemies with ferocious momentum, dealing strike and slash damage.

title: Smithscript Dagger
description: Dagger engraved with a smithscript. A throwing weapon created through the smithing arts. Execute a strong attack to throw the dagger, causing it to fly toward a distant target. Incompatible with ashes of war that grant skills with an affinity.

title: Firespark Perfume Bottle
description: Perfume bottle containing a fiery essence. A weapon used by Shadow Keep perfumers. Attacks release bursts of fire. The elegant form belies its capacity for terrible burns.

title: Chilling Perfume Bottle
description: Perfume bottle containing a chilling essence. A weapon used by Shadow Keep perfumers. Attacks release bursts of freezing cold mist, building up frostbite.

title: Frenzyflame Perfume Bottle
description: Perfume bottle containing a frenzied essence. A weapon used by perfumers devoted to the Flame of Frenzy. Attacks release bursts that build up madness in targets.

title: Lightning Perfume Bottle
description: Perfume bottle containing a lightning-infused essence. A weapon used by perfumers among the ancient dragon worshippers. Attacks release bursts of lightning.

title: Deadly Poison Perfume Bottle
description: Perfume bottle containing a deadly poison essence. A weapon used by perfumers among the followers of Romina. Attacks release bursts of deadly poison.

title: Dryleaf Arts
description: Technique of the Dryleaf monks, whose order practices a style of barehanded combat. A hand-to-hand fighting style incorporating powerful kicks as well as flowing, graceful strikes.

title: Dane's Footwork
description: Hand-to-hand arts of Dryleaf Dane. A fighting style that emphasizes powerful kicks above all else, incorporating spinning heel kicks and devastating foot sweeps. The absolute mastery of a legendary warrior.

title: Ancient Meteoric Ore Greatsword
description: Colossal sword hewn from ancient meteoric ore. A weapon of tremendous weight that demands both strength and technique to wield. The ore from which it is forged predates the Erdtree itself, carrying within it the gravity of the cosmos.

title: Fire Knight's Greatsword
description: Colossal greatsword wielded by fire knights. A massive blade imbued with the power of flame, used by the elite knights who serve Messmer. Its sweeping attacks can set wide areas ablaze.

title: Greatsword of Radahn (Light)
description: One of the paired greatswords of Radahn, the mightiest of the demigods. This sword, crackling with golden lightning, was born of Radahn's will as the Promised Consort. The blade channels sacred lightning and golden power.

title: Greatsword of Radahn (Lord)
description: One of the paired greatswords of Radahn, the Promised Consort. The Lord's blade embodies Radahn's boundless strength and his role as the chosen lord of Miquella. A colossal weapon that channels the power of the cosmos and starlight.

title: Moonrithyll's Knight Sword
description: Colossal sword of Moonrithyll, a Carian knight. A broad, weighty blade polished to a pale sheen reminiscent of moonlight. Carried by the most powerful of the Carian knight order that guards Castle Ensis.

title: Greatsword of Damnation
description: Greatsword of a knight of damnation, wreathed in shadows. The blade appears to drink in light rather than reflect it, leaving a darkness in its wake. Those struck by this weapon suffer the mark of damnation.

title: Greatsword of Solitude
description: Greatsword belonging to a lone knight of solitude, found in the shadow realm. A somber blade that resonates with the isolation of its former wielder. Its weight embodies the burden of one who walks alone.

title: Lizard Greatsword
description: Greatsword fashioned from the hide and bone of a great lizard of the Scadu Altus. An unusual weapon with a rough-hewn appearance that belies its considerable sharpness and durability.

title: Poleblade of the Bud
description: Halberd of Romina, Saint of the Bud, wreathed in scarlet rot. The blossoming bud at its tip weeps ichor that inflicts scarlet rot upon all it touches. A weapon revered among the followers of the rot goddess.

title: Spirit Glaive
description: Halberd wielded by the spirit soldiers of the Shadow realm. A sleek, ethereal blade that phases in and out of the material world. Those struck by this weapon may find their own spirit disturbed.

title: Flowerstone Gavel
description: Hammer carved from flowerstone, a decorative stone prized in the Realm of Shadow. An ornate weapon whose elegant carvings belie its capacity for brutal strikes. Weighs surprisingly little for its size.

title: Obsidian Lamina
description: Reaper with a blade of polished obsidian. A ceremonial weapon of the ancient hornsent, used in rites of death and remembrance. Its razor-sharp edge cuts through flesh with terrifying ease.

title: Tooth Whip
description: Whip fashioned from the teeth of beasts, strung together on a cord of sinew. Each lashing strike tears into flesh and builds up blood loss. A brutal weapon used by beast tamers of the Shadow realm.

title: Golem Fist
description: Fist weapon fashioned from the arm of a stone golem. Bestows the wearer with the crushing strength of a golem. Strikes deal massive poise damage and can topple even heavily armored foes.

title: Madding Hand
description: Fist weapon of black iron, belonging to Midra. A weapon imbued with frenzy flame, radiating an eerie orange glow. Its strikes build up madness in those it touches.

title: Thiollier's Hidden Needle
description: A slender needle weapon concealed within a gauntlet, belonging to Thiollier. A weapon of quiet assassination, coated in a paralyzing toxin. Its precise strikes target vulnerable points to build up deadly poison.

title: Poisoned Hand
description: Fist weapon coated in a vile, dripping poison. A crude but effective weapon used by assassins in the Realm of Shadow. Each strike seeps poison into the wound, building up deadly poison.

title: Claws of Night
description: Claws of pure shadow, wielded by a dancer of the night. These translucent blades seem to be woven from darkness itself, cutting through light and leaving wounds that fester. The dancer's tools for a lethal, graceful performance.

title: Dancing Blade of Ranah
description: Curved sword wielded by the Dancer of Ranah. A blade of shimmering darkness, used in a deadly ritualistic dance. Its sweeping, flowing attacks leave trails of shadow that confound and harm foes.

title: Falx
description: Curved sword with a distinctive inward-curving blade. A weapon used by Curseblade warriors. The revenger's blade tears through flesh in a sweeping motion, building up blood loss with each strike.

title: Horned Warrior's Sword
description: Curved sword of the horned warriors of the Shadow realm. The crescent-shaped blade is honed to a razor edge, and its sweeping, flowing strikes reflect the ferocity of these ancient warriors.

title: Spirit Sword
description: A curved sword wielded by the spirit soldiers of the shadow realm. Translucent and seemingly formed of pure spirit energy, this blade phases in and out of visibility as it strikes.

title: Freyja's Greatsword
description: Curved greatsword of Redmane Freyja. A war-worn blade carried through countless battles. Its broad, sweeping strikes bear the weight of Freyja's long years of campaigning and her undying loyalty.

title: Horned Warrior's Greatsword
description: Curved greatsword of the horned warriors, enormous and fearsome. The wide crescent blade is suited to powerful sweeping strikes that can knock foes from their feet. A weapon that embodies the brute strength of these ancient shadow warriors.

title: Carian Sorcery Sword
description: Thrusting sword shaped like a Carian glintstone shard. A crystalline blade that doubles as a sorcery catalyst. Can be used to cast sorceries without switching weapons, scaling with Intelligence.

title: Queelign's Greatsword
description: Heavy thrusting sword of Fire Knight Queelign. A long, powerful blade that combines great reach with devastating thrusting force. Infused with a sacred fire that burns those it strikes.

title: Sword Lance
description: Enormous sword resembling a lance, designed for powerful thrusting attacks. A weapon that combines the penetrating reach of a lance with the cutting edge of a sword. Demands great strength to wield effectively.

title: Star-Lined Sword
description: Katana with a blade etched with star patterns. A weapon of the shadow soldiers, its meteoric blade bears ancient star-forged runes. The keen edge incites blood loss and the starlight etchings shimmer as the blade moves.

title: Sword of Night
description: Katana imbued with the power of night. A dark blade wreathed in shadow, wielded by the Swordhand of Night. Its strikes carry the weight of absolute darkness and inflict magic damage alongside physical harm.

title: Stone-Sheathed Sword
description: Straight sword perpetually encased in a stone sheath. When drawn for an attack the stone casing shatters, releasing stored power. The stone reforms after each strike, perpetually ready to unleash its force again.

title: Sword of Light
description: Straight sword that radiates sacred golden light. One of a paired set, this blade channels the power of grace and is wielded by a shadow knight devoted to the light. Deals holy damage in addition to physical.

title: Sword of Darkness
description: Straight sword that radiates shadowed darkness. One of a paired set, this blade channels the power of shadow and is wielded by a knight devoted to the dark. Deals magic damage in addition to physical.

title: Velvet Sword of St Trina
description: Straight sword of St. Trina, wreathed in the tranquil mist of sleep. The velvet blade induces sleep in those it strikes, sending them into a deep and abiding slumber from which they may not easily wake.

title: Death Knight's Twin Axes
description: Paired axes wielded by the death knights, servants of death in the Realm of Shadow. These twin blades are hurled at enemies in spinning arcs of destruction, returning to the wielder after each throw.

title: Forked-Tongue Hatchet
description: Hatchet with a forked blade resembling a serpent's tongue. A weapon used by the snake-worshipping warriors of the shadow realm. Its twin points pierce and tear, inflicting grievous wounds.

title: Smithscript Axe
description: Axe engraved with a smithscript. A throwing weapon created through the smithing arts. Execute a strong attack to throw the axe, sending it spinning toward a distant foe.

title: Messmer Soldier's Axe
description: Axe carried by soldiers in Messmer's army. A simple but brutally effective weapon, standard issue for the legions that serve the Impaler. Its blade is stained with the blood of many enemies.

title: Bonny Butchering Knife
description: Massive cleaver used by the bonny butchers of the shadow realm. A crude but terrifying weapon whose wide, heavy blade is designed for cleaving through flesh and bone with equal ease.

title: Death Knight's Longhaft Axe
description: Long-hafted greataxe wielded by the death knights. An enormous weapon suited to sweeping wide arcs that clear entire groups of enemies. The death knights of the Shadow realm wield it with fearsome proficiency.

title: Putrescence Cleaver
description: Massive cleaver of the Putrescent Knight, dripping with putrid fluid. The enormous blade is corroded with rot and filth, and its strikes inflict scarlet rot upon foes. A fearsome weapon of the afflicted knight.

title: Serpent Flail
description: Flail fashioned in the likeness of a coiling serpent. A weapon used by the snake-worshipping warriors of the Realm of Shadow. Its serpentine chain lashes out with unpredictable trajectories, building up poison.

title: Bloodfiend's Fork
description: Spear wielded by the bloodfiends of the Shadow realm. A grisly weapon with two tines designed to pierce and tear. Strikes build up fearsome blood loss.

title: Smithscript Spear
description: Spear engraved with a smithscript. A throwing weapon created through the smithing arts. Execute a strong attack to throw the spear at distant foes.

title: Swift Spear
description: A light, slender spear designed for rapid thrusting attacks. Unlike the weighty spears of larger warriors, this weapon favors agility and speed, allowing for quick jabbing strikes in rapid succession.

title: Bloodfiend's Sacred Spear
description: Sacred great spear of the bloodfiend apostle, imbued with blood power. A weapon of tremendous reach whose strikes build up severe blood loss. Wielded by the most powerful of the blood-frenzied creatures.

title: Messmer Soldier's Spear
description: Spear carried by soldiers in Messmer's army. A standard-issue weapon for the infantry legions of the Impaler. Simple, reliable, and deadly in the hands of trained soldiers.

title: Spear of the Impaler
description: Great spear of Messmer the Impaler. A long, serrated weapon dripping with the flame of Messmer. Its strikes pierce deep, and those impaled suffer burning flame damage. The defining weapon of the lord of fire.

title: Barbed Staff-Spear
description: A great spear with a staff-like shaft covered in barbs. A weapon used by the inquisitors of the shadow realm. Its barbed tip tears into flesh and resists being pulled free, making removal agonizing.

title: Staff of the Great Beyond
description: Staff of a scholar from beyond the veil. A gnarled staff that resonates with power from realms unseen. An effective catalyst for sorceries, particularly those dealing with gravity and cosmic forces.

title: Maternal Staff
description: Staff of Metyr, Mother of Fingers. A great, writhing staff formed from intertwined fingers. An extraordinary catalyst that amplifies sorceries related to fingers and the higher will. Grants access to the power of Metyr.

title: Dryleaf Seal
description: Sacred seal in the form of a dried leaf, used by the Dryleaf monks. A catalyst for incantations, particularly those of a bestial nature. The dried leaf channels the prayers of the ascetic monks.

title: Fire Knight's Seal
description: Sacred seal used by the fire knights in service of Messmer. A potent catalyst for fire incantations, amplifying the scorching power of flame-based prayers. Favored by the elite knights of the Impaler.

title: Spiraltree Seal
description: Sacred seal shaped like the spiraling bough of an Erdtree. A powerful catalyst for incantations, particularly those relating to the Erdtree and its golden power. The spiral form resonates with the essence of life.

title: Lamenting Visage
description: A torch fashioned from a weeping, mask-like face. The face eternally sheds flaming tears, lighting the way with sorrowful fire. Its mournful flame wards off enemies and illuminates the darkness of the shadow realm.

title: Nanaya's Torch
description: Torch of Nanaya, a shadow perfumer. Burns with a dark, perfumed flame that releases intoxicating fumes. The scented smoke can build up sleep in those who breathe it in.

title: Dueling Shield
description: A thrusting shield designed for one-on-one combat. Reinforced at the tip to allow offensive thrusting attacks while simultaneously defending. A weapon favored by dueling specialists who refuse to sacrifice offense for defense.

title: Carian Thrusting Shield
description: A thrusting shield of Carian make, embedded with glintstone. The crystalline tip channels glintstone power, allowing offensive thrusts to deal magic damage in addition to physical. A weapon of Carian knight-scholars.

title: Messmer Soldier Shield
description: Medium shield carried by soldiers in Messmer's army. A standard-issue shield bearing the sigil of the Impaler. Sturdy and reliable, it has guarded many of Messmer's soldiers through fierce battles.

title: Wolf Crest Shield
description: Medium shield bearing the crest of a wolf. A shield used by wolf-devoted warriors of the shadow realm. Its surface is engraved with a snarling wolf motif, symbol of ferocity and pack loyalty.

title: Serpent Crest Shield
description: Medium shield bearing the crest of a serpent. A shield used by serpent warriors of the shadow realm, engraved with a coiling snake. The serpent motif is both a symbol and a ward against the enemies of their order.

title: Golden Lion Shield
description: Medium shield bearing the crest of a golden lion. A shield of the shadow militia, emblazoned with a roaring lion in gold. Its gleaming surface reflects light proudly, a sign of the soldiers who carry it.

title: Smithscript Shield
description: Small shield engraved with a smithscript. A shield that can be thrown like a projectile. Execute a strong attack to hurl the shield at distant foes, where it will arc back to the wielder.

title: Shield of Night
description: Small shield imbued with the power of night. A shield of shadow and darkness, carried by the knights of the night. Its surface seems to absorb light rather than reflect it.

title: Black Steel Greatshield
description: Greatshield of black steel carried by the black steel knights of the shadow realm. A massive shield of exceptional quality, offering superior protection against all manner of attacks.

title: Verdigris Greatshield
description: Greatshield of ancient copper, now overgrown with verdigris. A massive shield that despite its age remains incredibly sturdy. The green patina of age lends it a distinctive appearance and surprising resilience.

title: Anvil Hammer
description: An enormous hammer shaped like a blacksmith's anvil. A colossal weapon of crushing weight that flattens foes underfoot. It is less a weapon than a portable forge instrument repurposed for war.

title: Bloodfiend's Arm
description: The severed arm of a massive bloodfiend, used as a colossal weapon. A grotesque but terrifyingly effective bludgeon. Strikes build up fearsome blood loss in those unfortunate enough to be struck.

title: Devonia's Hammer
description: An enormous hammer belonging to the giant Devonia. A colossal weapon of terrifying weight that crumbles stone and bone alike. The hammer's head bears ancient inscriptions of an unknown origin.

title: Shadow Sunflower Blossom
description: Colossal weapon formed from the blossom of a shadow sunflower. A sacred weapon of the Scadutree Avatar, radiating the power of the shadow erdtree. Its enormous petal-like blades sweep through enemies with the weight of a falling tree.

title: Gazing Finger
description: Colossal weapon fashioned from the enormous finger of a god. A grotesque weapon that channels the power of Metyr, Mother of Fingers. Its strikes carry the incomprehensible weight of a higher being's attention.

title: Ansbach's Longbow
description: Longbow of Sir Ansbach, the former servant of Mohg. A refined bow favored by a skilled archer who serves Miquella's cause. Its draw is long and deliberate, and its arrows strike with exceptional force and precision.

title: Igon's Greatbow
description: Enormous greatbow belonging to Igon, the dragon hunter. A weapon of terrible power, designed to pierce the thick hide of dragons. Drawing this bow demands immense strength, but its arrows strike like ballista bolts.

title: Bone Bow
description: Bow crafted from the bone of an ancient creature. A light, swift bow used by the gravebird hunters of the shadow realm. Its bone construction gives it surprising flexibility and resilience.

title: Repeating Crossbow
description: A crossbow fitted with a magazine mechanism allowing rapid, repeated firing. A weapon of advanced craftsmanship that sacrifices individual bolt power for a blistering rate of fire.

title: Spread Crossbow
description: A crossbow with a wide-mouthed barrel that fires multiple bolts simultaneously in a spread pattern. Effective at close range against groups of enemies, though accuracy suffers at distance.

title: Rabbath's Cannon
description: An enormous hand cannon devised by Rabbath, a master of ballistic engineering. A ballista-class weapon that fires enormous explosive rounds. The cannon's report shakes the earth and its projectiles obliterate whatever they strike.

title: Main-gauche
description: A slender parrying dagger designed for use in the off-hand. Its long, narrow blade is perfect for catching and deflecting enemy weapons, creating openings for a deadly counterattack.

title: Fire Knight's Shortsword
description: Short sword carried by fire knights as a backup weapon. A compact blade favored by the elite fire knights of Messmer's army. Imbued with a trace of flame, it can ignite enemies with precise strikes.

title: Smithscript Greathammer
description: Great hammer engraved with a smithscript. A throwing weapon created through the smithing arts. Execute a strong attack to hurl the hammer, sending it crashing into distant foes with tremendous force.

title: Black Steel Greathammer
description: Great hammer of black steel used by the black steel knights. A massive, weighty weapon that delivers devastating crushing blows. The black steel alloy from which it is forged gives it exceptional hardness and weight.

title: Black Steel Twinblade
description: Twinblade of black steel used by the black steel knights. A double-bladed weapon that spins with lethal efficiency. The black steel construction gives it both weight and durability for sustained combat.

title: Euporia
description: Paired twinblades of Miquella, shining with golden radiance. A weapon of sublime craftsmanship, its twin blades glow with holy light. Euporia embodies Miquella's ideal of a perfected weapon, dealing holy damage that strikes down the impure.
